speaker: speaker1
text: Did you hear about the robbery ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Did I hear about it ? I saw it happen .

speaker: speaker2
text: A man came into the bank with a gun .

speaker: speaker2
text: I was so scared when I saw the gun .

speaker: speaker2
text: He took the money and tried to get away .

speaker: speaker1
text: Did the cops show up in time ?

speaker: speaker2
text: He didn't even make it out the door .
